summary: AI-native legal-services platform for fixed-fee immigration firms.
editor_note: Someone finally attacked legal AI from the business model, not the Word add-in. Manifest OS powers immigration firms with fixed-fee pricing, a client portal, AI Drafter, AI Case Evaluation, and 3,000+ handled engagements. Unlike Harvey-style copilot tools, the bet is to operate the service stack and reinvest firm profits into R&D. The risk is bar-by-bar regulation slowing the model outside Arizona.
